rows.description: St. Gr. Page Turner, Bar: pro claus: voc. Smiths & Merton pro anno [apud Merton pro anno]
rows.notes: Pounds amount '206' visually confirmed, so gpt-5-mini is correct; gemini-flash incorrectly read '6'. Shillings (10) and pence (10) agreed. The description is a combination from both extractors and visual verification, including the bracketed continuation 'apud Merton pro anno' as part of this single entry. gpt-5-mini's separate row for 'apud Merton pro anno' was dropped as it has no independent amounts and is a descriptive continuation of the main entry.
